name: Pressure Vessel Thickness Calculator
description: Calculates minimum required wall thickness for cylindrical pressure vessels based on ASME BPVC Section VIII Div. 1 standards, with integrated safety factors, material utilization, and cost optimization.

standardOptions.label: ASME BPVC Section VIII
standardOptions.description: American Society of Mechanical Engineers Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code

inputs.label: Design Pressure (P)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable working pressure per ASME UG-21

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowable working pressure per ASME UG-21
businessContext_i18n.tr: ASME UG-21'e göre izin verilen maksimum çalışma basıncı
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässiger Betriebsdruck gemäß ASME UG-21
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression maximale de service admissible selon ASME UG-21
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión máxima de trabajo admisible según ASME UG-21

businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre intérieur de la coque cylindrique
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro interior de la carcasa cilíndrica

inputs.label: Allowable Stress (S)
inputs.businessContext: Material allowable stress at design temperature per ASME II Part D

businessContext_i18n.en: Material allowable stress at design temperature per ASME II Part D
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım sıcaklığında malzemenin izin verilen gerilmesi, ASME II Kısım D'ye göre
businessContext_i18n.de: Zulässige Werkstoffspannung bei Auslegungstemperatur gemäß ASME II Teil D
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte admissible du matériau à la température de calcul selon ASME II Part D
businessContext_i18n.es: Esfuerzo admisible del material a temperatura de diseño según ASME II Parte D

inputs.label: Joint Efficiency (E)
inputs.businessContext: Welded joint efficiency factor per ASME UW-12

businessContext_i18n.en: Welded joint efficiency factor per ASME UW-12
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynaklı bağlantı verimlilik faktörü, ASME UW-12'ye göre
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'efficacité du joint soudé selon ASME UW-12
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de eficiencia de junta soldada según ASME UW-12

inputs.label: Corrosion Allowance (CA)
inputs.businessContext: Additional thickness for corrosion/erosion per UG-25

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional thickness for corrosion/erosion per UG-25
businessContext_i18n.tr: UG-25'e göre korozyon/erozyon için ek kalınlık
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Wanddicke für Korrosion/Erosion gemäß UG-25
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur supplémentaire pour corrosion/érosion selon UG-25
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor adicional por corrosión/erosión según UG-25

inputs.label: Material Utilization Factor
inputs.businessContext: Lean manufacturing metric for material waste reduction

businessContext_i18n.en: Lean manufacturing metric for material waste reduction
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme israfını azaltmak için yalın üretim metriği
businessContext_i18n.fr: Métrique Lean pour la réduction des déchets de matériaux
businessContext_i18n.es: Métrica Lean para reducción de desperdicio de material

inputs.label: Override Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Enable to use custom safety factor instead of ASME default 3.5

businessContext_i18n.en: Enable to use custom safety factor instead of ASME default 3.5
businessContext_i18n.tr: ASME varsayılan 3.5 yerine özel güvenlik faktörü kullanmak için etkinleştirin
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktivieren, um einen benutzerdefinierten Sicherheitsfaktor anstelle des ASME-Standards 3,5 zu verwenden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Activer pour utiliser un facteur de sécurité personnalisé au lieu de la valeur par défaut ASME de 3,5
businessContext_i18n.es: Habilitar para usar factor de seguridad personalizado en lugar del valor por defecto ASME de 3.5

inputs.label: Custom Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Only used if override is enabled; typical range per ISO 16528

businessContext_i18n.en: Only used if override is enabled; typical range per ISO 16528
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yalnızca geçersiz kılma etkinse kullanılır; ISO 16528'e göre tipik aralık
businessContext_i18n.de: Nur verwendet, wenn Überschreibung aktiviert ist; typischer Bereich gemäß ISO 16528
businessContext_i18n.fr: Utilisé uniquement si le remplacement est activé ; plage typique selon ISO 16528
businessContext_i18n.es: Solo se usa si la anulación está habilitada; rango típico según ISO 16528

rules.message: Design pressure exceeds 38.5% of allowable stress. Thick-wall formulas required (ASME UG-27(c)(2)).
Diameter-to-thickness ratio < 10. Consider thick-wall vessel analysis per ASME Appendix 1.
Material utilization below 70%. Review nesting and cutting plan for Lean improvement.

thresholds.message: Calculated thickness < 5mm. Fabrication handling risk; consider minimum thickness per ASME UG-16.
Material cost exceeds $150/unit. Evaluate alternative materials or reduce corrosion allowance.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
